sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70984" key="nomodida/skalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νομο-δῐδάσκᾰλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n70984.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">teacher of the law,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Luc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.17</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
